song.title: R51 The Love Only Found In The Lord
song.lyrics:
[v1] I'd been yearning for something other Than my life's success each day. Dreams of living better than others Wasted life, so now I pray.
[c] Chorus: "Lord, I give my whole life to You. Lord I want You more each day." Now I know what I've been needing, It's been here forever, the love only found in the Lord.
[v2] Turning's hard, but I'm getting better. Singing, praying, reading each day. Learning what's my purpose for living, I can talk with Him and say;
[v3] Once a sinner, now a believer, I am proud to say I'm saved. I want God in my life forever - Loving Him from day to day.
[e] Ending: The love only found in the Lord... Forever, the love in the Lord... The greatest thin ever...the Lord.
